features.featureTitle: In the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx), update the contact phone number displayed in the footer contact section to '+91-8429145707'. This corresponds to the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/p[1]. Also update any tel: href link associated with this phone number to 'tel:+918429145707'.
